calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-06-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Emory Waite, Plaintiff/Respondent on his own behalf
Adam Guzman, company representative for Defendant/Appellant Boas International Motors

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Emory Waite, plaintiff/respondent testifies on his own behalf and identifies Exhibit 1 as the receipt for $1,000 paid to defendant/appellant.

Adam Guzman testifies on behalf of defendant/appellant and identifies Exhibit A as the contract signed by Mr. Waite.

Exhibit 1 is returned to Mr. Waite in open court.

Matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles, Clerk Marilyn Flores, NOT REPORTED

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-12-2007 Judgment Entered
